title: HTML Tables Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential tags for creating and organizing HTML tables.

questions.question: Which tag acts as the main container for an HTML table?
What is the result of using the <tr> tag in a table?
options: It defines a single table cell (Table Registry).
It defines a new Table Row.
It acts as a primary header for a column.

questions.question: Which element should you use for header cells that are usually bold and centered?
Which attribute should you add to a cell to make it span across multiple columns?
What is the purpose of the <thead>, <tbody>, and <tfoot> elements in HTML tables?
options: They are required for all tables to render correctly.
They provide semantic structure for easier styling and accessibility.
They are used to create nested tables within a single cell.
They define the borders and margins of the table.
